subcodes.first_line: O esteemed pilgrim! Thy request hath been accepted, and I have set forth to write that which thou didst desire. I beseech forgiveness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر محترم خواهش تو مقبول گشت و بنگارش آنچه خواستی پرداختم طلب آمرزش بجهت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
